R_100: 0,43,98,24,31,23,82,13,64,67,1,36,2,85,3,7,70,42,79,83,10,8,69,53,38,62,91,89,58,93,78,15,75,95,100,99,9,21,30,4,87,16,72,96,12,86,41,5,33,27,17,34,94,46,25,97,55,88,74,11,52,90,66,81,77,35,48,56,19,44,59,14,40,32,0|57,92,29,22,28,45,80,54,20,18,47,61,37,26,73,50,49,-1,6,60,51,76,39,65,63,84,68,71|1,7,11,15,17,22,23,28,30,36,39,43,47,50,55,57,71,-1,3,8,11,23,30,44,51,55,56,73|4,10,13,17,22,23,28,30,32,38,40,45,49,53,57,61,75,-1,6,11,14,28,35,49,54,56,61,75
